description: Large transfer to a new recipient for property booking. Moderate risk requiring verification.

transaction.purpose: Booking advance for flat in Whitefield - builder ABC Realty

risk_factors.description: Large real estate transactions warrant verification
Payment to a registered business name

expected_explanation: Large first-time transfer for property booking. While this could be legitimate, the amount is significant and the recipient is new. We recommend verifying the builder's RERA registration before proceeding.

expected_conversation.speaker: Agent
expected_conversation.message: This is a large transfer to a new recipient. Can you confirm - have you visited the property and met the builder in person?

expected_conversation.speaker: Customer
expected_conversation.message: Yes, I visited the site last week and have all the documentation. The builder is RERA registered.

expected_conversation.speaker: Agent
expected_conversation.message: Good. Since you've verified the builder's RERA registration and visited the property, this appears legitimate. I recommend keeping all documentation. You may proceed with caution.
